steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Activate WooCommerce if not active
if ( ! class_exists( 'WooCommerce' ) ) {
    activate_plugin( 'woocommerce/woocommerce.php' );
    WC_Install::install();
}

// Create WooCommerce shop pages
WC_Install::create_pages();

// Helper: create WC attribute and return id
function demo_create_attribute( $name, $slug ) {
    $result = wc_create_attribute( [
        'name'         => $name,
        'slug'         => $slug,
        'type'         => 'select',
        'order_by'     => 'menu_order',
        'has_archives' => false,
    ] );
    return is_wp_error( $result ) ? 0 : $result;
}

// Register taxonomy for this request then insert terms
function demo_register_and_insert_terms( $taxonomy, $terms ) {
    $ids = [];
    if ( ! taxonomy_exists( $taxonomy ) ) {
        register_taxonomy( $taxonomy, 'product', [
            'hierarchical' => false,
            'public'       => true,
        ] );
    }
    foreach ( $terms as $term ) {
        $existing = get_term_by( 'slug', sanitize_title( $term ), $taxonomy );
        if ( $existing ) {
            $ids[ $term ] = $existing->term_id;
        } else {
            $inserted = wp_insert_term( $term, $taxonomy );
            $ids[ $term ] = is_array( $inserted ) ? $inserted['term_id'] : 0;
        }
    }
    return $ids;
}

// Create Size attribute
$size_attr_id = demo_create_attribute( 'Size', 'size' );
$size_terms   = demo_register_and_insert_terms( 'pa_size', [ 'Small', 'Medium', 'Large', 'XL' ] );

// Create Material attribute
$material_attr_id = demo_create_attribute( 'Material', 'material' );
$material_terms   = demo_register_and_insert_terms( 'pa_material', [ 'Cotton', 'Polyester', 'Premium Cotton' ] );

// Build rules JSON
$rules = [
    [
        'attribute'       => 'pa_size',
        'attribute_label' => 'Size',
        'rows'            => [
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $size_terms['Small'] ],          'value_slugs' => [ 'small' ],          'value_labels' => [ 'Small' ],          'price' => '19.99', 'status' => 'active' ],
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $size_terms['Medium'] ],         'value_slugs' => [ 'medium' ],         'value_labels' => [ 'Medium' ],         'price' => '22.99', 'status' => 'active' ],
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $size_terms['Large'] ],          'value_slugs' => [ 'large' ],          'value_labels' => [ 'Large' ],          'price' => '25.99', 'status' => 'active' ],
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $size_terms['XL'] ],             'value_slugs' => [ 'xl' ],             'value_labels' => [ 'XL' ],             'price' => '29.99', 'status' => 'active' ],
        ],
    ],
    [
        'attribute'       => 'pa_material',
        'attribute_label' => 'Material',
        'rows'            => [
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $material_terms['Cotton'] ],         'value_slugs' => [ 'cotton' ],         'value_labels' => [ 'Cotton' ],         'price' => '0.00', 'status' => 'active' ],
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $material_terms['Polyester'] ],      'value_slugs' => [ 'polyester' ],      'value_labels' => [ 'Polyester' ],      'price' => '3.00', 'status' => 'active' ],
            [ 'value_ids' => [ $material_terms['Premium Cotton'] ], 'value_slugs' => [ 'premium-cotton' ], 'value_labels' => [ 'Premium Cotton' ], 'price' => '8.00', 'status' => 'active' ],
        ],
    ],
];

// Create price_blueprint CPT post
$blueprint_id = wp_insert_post( [
    'post_title'  => 'T-Shirt Pricing',
    'post_type'   => 'price_blueprint',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
] );

if ( $blueprint_id && ! is_wp_error( $blueprint_id ) ) {
    update_post_meta( $blueprint_id, 'prbp_template_rules', json_encode( $rules ) );
}

// Create product
$product_id = wp_insert_post( [
    'post_title'  => 'Custom T-Shirt',
    'post_type'   => 'product',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
] );

if ( $product_id && ! is_wp_error( $product_id ) ) {
    wp_set_object_terms( $product_id, 'prbp_configurable_product', 'product_type' );
    update_post_meta( $product_id, 'prbp_template_id', $blueprint_id );
    update_post_meta( $product_id, '_price', '19.99' );
    update_post_meta( $product_id, '_regular_price', '19.99' );
    update_post_meta( $product_id, '_stock_status', 'instock' );
    update_post_meta( $product_id, '_manage_stock', 'no' );
    update_post_meta( $product_id, '_visibility', 'visible' );

    // Assign attributes to product
    $product_attributes = [];
    foreach ( [ 'pa_size' => $size_terms, 'pa_material' => $material_terms ] as $taxonomy => $terms ) {
        $term_ids = array_values( $terms );
        wp_set_object_terms( $product_id, $term_ids, $taxonomy );
        $product_attributes[ $taxonomy ] = [
            'name'         => $taxonomy,
            'value'        => '',
            'position'     => 0,
            'is_visible'   => 1,
            'is_variation' => 0,
            'is_taxonomy'  => 1,
        ];
    }
    update_post_meta( $product_id, '_product_attributes', $product_attributes );
}

echo 'PriceBlueprint demo data created. Blueprint ID: ' . $blueprint_id . ', Product ID: ' . $product_id;
